Deck contractor in Sapulpa, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Sapulpa and surrounding communities

Serving Sapulpa, OK

Fincannon Outdoor Living LLC is delighted to offer our deck building and outdoor living services to Sapulpa, Oklahoma. As a historic town with a strong sense of community, Sapulpa residents appreciate the value of a well-maintained and beautiful home. We specialize in creating outdoor spaces that enhance the charm and character of your property. We offer a comprehensive range of services, from custom deck designs to patio installations and pergola construction. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and craftsmanship. We'll work with you to design an outdoor living space that meets your specific needs and budget. Trust Fincannon Outdoor Living LLC to transform your Sapulpa backyard into a welcoming and enjoyable outdoor retreat.

Sapulpa, with its historic downtown and community events, fosters a strong sense of neighborliness and outdoor gatherings.

Custom Deck Design

Personalized deck design services to bring your vision to life.

Professional deck construction services using premium materials and expert craftsmanship.

Reliable deck repair services to restore the safety and beauty of your outdoor space.

Deck Staining & Sealing

Protect and beautify your deck with our professional staining and sealing services.

Learn more →

Pergolas and Patios

Design and construction of custom pergolas and patios to enhance your outdoor living space.

Learn more →

Deck Lighting

Illuminate your outdoor space with our professional deck lighting installation services.
